title: Wham Bell Pot 4 x 36cm Round Plastic Garden Planters | 100% Recycled Plastic | Lightweight & Weather-Resistant | Drainage Points for Easy Drilling | Indoor & Outdoor Use | Made in UK - Slate
features: ECO-FRIENDLY GARDEN PLANTERS: Made from 100% recycled plastic, offering a sustainable and long-lasting choice for patios, gardens, balconies and indoor plant displays.
PRACTICAL SIZE FOR PLANTING: The set includes 4 x 36cm round planters, each measuring L 360 x W 360 x H 290mm externally - ideal for flowers, herbs, bedding plants and potted shrubs.
DRAINAGE-READY BASE: The planter includes drill-hole guides for effective drainage, supporting healthy root growth and helping prevent waterlogging.
CLASSIC BELL POT DESIGN: Features a timeless bell shape with a flared rim, providing excellent stability and making replanting simple and hassle-free.
MADE IN THE UK: Proudly designed and manufactured in Britain from strong, sustainable materials built for long-term garden use.
description: Add traditional charm and practical performance to your garden with the Wham Bell Pot range. Crafted from 100% recycled plastic, this sustainable planter is lightweight, durable and weather-resistant, making it a reliable choice for year-round planting in both indoor and outdoor spaces. The classic bell-shaped design with a flared rim offers timeless appeal while providing excellent stability and easy handling. Perfect for vibrant floral displays, bedding plants, herbs or structured shrubs, the Bell Pot makes planting and replanting simple and stress-free. Each planter includes a drainage-ready base with clear drill-hole guides, helping you create the ideal growing environment for healthy, thriving plants. Proudly made in the UK from sustainable, recycled materials, the Wham Bell Pot combines eco-conscious design with everyday practicality - a dependable addition to any garden, balcony or patio. External Dimensions: L 360 x W 360 x H 290mm
